query_normalized: predicting the impact of alloying on high-temperature oxidation resistance materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the dependent variable (high-temperature oxidation resistance) within the same domain (materials science/metals), providing empirical data on the outcome phenomenon even though the independent variable (residual stress) differs from the user's focus (alloying). It serves as a relevant baseline study for oxidation behavior in the material class under investigation.
